title: Alazeprt's Computer
description: A fabric mod for adding computers for decoration in minecraft
body:
# Mod Description
Welcome to Alazeprt's Computer mod. This module is developed based on Fabric. Computers are added to the module to make your game more modern. Although these computers cannot be started, they are just for decoration, but you can also use these computers to decorate your map to make your map look better.

**Due to the author's technical reasons, the development of this module has been temporarily suspended**

## Future plans
1. Add more types of computers (already in the process)
2. Add more electronic products
3. Enable the computer to actually start up (using virtual machines requires the help of a skilled programmer)

## About Open Source Licensing
License: GNU Lesser General Public License(LGPL) v2.1
Source Link: [Open Source](https://github.com/alazeprt/Alazeprt-Computer)

If you have a better idea or find a bug in the mod,please go to [Github](https://github.com/alazeprt/Alazeprt-Computer) Instructions for sending issues
